title: sticherus rubiginosus
intro: Sticherus rubiginosus, also known as the rusty club moss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the genus Sticherus and family Lycopodiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Sticherus rubiginosus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to address a range of health concerns.
